things.name: Caruggi Historic District
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage labyrinth of medieval lanes, the largest in Europe

things.name: Rolli Palaces (Via Garibaldi)
things.description: UNESCO-listed Renaissance palaces along the Street of the Kings

things.name: Aquarium of Genoa
things.description: One of Europe's largest aquariums with whale sharks, dolphins and penguin beach

things.name: Palazzo Ducale
things.description: Former seat of the Doges of Genoa with excellent art exhibitions

things.name: Porto Antico
things.description: Regenerated old port designed by Renzo Piano with the Bigo crane viewpoint

things.name: Lanterna Lighthouse
things.description: One of the world's oldest working lighthouses, symbol of Genoa since 1543

things.name: Museo di Palazzo Reale
things.description: Royal palace with magnificent Hall of Mirrors and Savoy royal collections

things.name: Cattedrale di San Lorenzo
things.description: Gothic-Romanesque cathedral with Gothic doorways and a mysterious sacred relic

things.name: Boccadasse
things.description: Picturesque fishermen's hamlet within the city with colourful houses and a small beach

things.name: Piazza de Ferrari
things.description: Elegant main square with the iconic bronze fountain and Liberty architecture
